JUDGE ROBERT DONDERO, CLERKS DIANNE BOFFI, VERA MU, REPORTER JOANN BRYCE. MASTER CALENDAR MOTION CALENDAR ON JUN-23-2004 IN DEPT. 206, DEFENDANT TOM BURBANK'S MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL DATE IS GRANTED. THE TRIAL DATE IS CONTINUED FROM 7/6/04 TO 8/30/04 @ 9:30AM IN DEPT. 206. NO SUMMARY JUDGMENT MOTIONS AND NO EXTENSION OF DISCOVERY. A NEW SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE WILL BE SET AND MAILED BY THE COURT.
